hook.summary: High-fidelity 3D character showcase with a countdown.
hook.visual_action: A female character in a red outfit poses for the camera, followed by rapid outfit changes.
hook.text_overlay: 카운트다운 1일, 접속 즉시 한정 캐릭터 증정

scene_flow: Introduction of a high-fidelity 3D female character in a red traditional-style outfit posing.
Rapid succession of outfit changes showcasing different styles including white/gold and checkered patterns.
Transition to darker and more elegant outfits such as dark green and floral patterns.
Final showcase of a white/silver celestial-style outfit while maintaining the countdown text.
audience_proxy: Male mobile gamers attracted to high-quality 3D character models and eastern-fantasy MMORPGs.
